titlestmt.titleproper: Burton Bernstein research files on James Thurber8744

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:44:35 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMM08744Burton Bernstein research files on James Thurber8744Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:13:37 UTC. >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Burton Bernstein research files on James Thurber
Bernstein, Burton
8744
1 cubic feet.
1910-1980 Letters, notes, drafts, and source materials compiled or created by Burton Bernstein in the process of the research and writing of his biography of American writer James Thurber, published in 1975. Includes correspondence between Bernstein and E.B. White and Katharine White. 11072816
Content Description
Letters, notes, drafts, and source materials compiled or created by Burton Bernstein in the process of the research and writing of his biography of American writer James Thurber, published in 1975. Includes correspondence between Bernstein and E.B. White and Katharine White.
Biographical / Historical
Burton Bernstein was a staff writer for The New Yorker magazine from 1957 to 1992 and the author of eight books. He is the younger brother of American composer and conductor Leonard Bernstein.
Preferred Citation
Burton Bernstein research files on James Thurber, #8744. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Authors, American Bernstein, Burton Thurber, James, 1894-1961 White, E. B. (Elwyn Brooks), 1899-1985 White, Katharine Sergeant Angell.
